description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on pushes to main, branches matching *.*, tags matching v*, and non-dev, non-pre, non-post tags. Also trigger on pull requests, workflow dispatch, and a daily schedule at 07:00 UTC. The workflow has several jobs with concurrency control, including core, tests, docs, conda, and extras, utilizing reusable workflows and custom steps for various environments and testing purposes.
